PenPal Draw v0.2.0 - Windows Distribution
==========================================

A drawing app for XPPen Artist 15.6 Pro V2 and other pen tablets.

FILES INCLUDED
--------------

Option 1 - Installer (Recommended):
  penpal-draw_0.2.0_x64-setup.exe
  - Easy installation wizard
  - Adds to Start Menu
  - Can be uninstalled from Control Panel
  - Size: ~1.5 MB

Option 2 - MSI Installer:
  penpal-draw_0.2.0_x64_en-US.msi
  - For IT administrators
  - Silent install support
  - Size: ~2.2 MB

Option 3 - Portable (No install):
  penpal-draw-v0.2.0-windows-portable.zip
  - Extract and run penpal-draw.exe
  - No installation needed
  - Can run from USB drive
  - Size: ~1.9 MB

SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
-------------------
- Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit)
- For pressure sensitivity: XPPen or Wacom tablet
- 100 MB free disk space

INSTALLATION
------------

Using Setup.exe:
1. Run penpal-draw_0.2.0_x64-setup.exe
2. Follow installation wizard
3. Launch from Start Menu or Desktop shortcut

Using Portable:
1. Extract penpal-draw-v0.2.0-windows-portable.zip
2. Run penpal-draw.exe
3. That's it!

FIRST TIME SETUP
----------------
1. Connect your XPPen Artist 15.6 Pro V2
2. Install XPPen drivers from https://www.xp-pen.com/download
3. Launch PenPal Draw
4. Select your pen display from the "Display" dropdown
5. Click "Move" to position on your pen display
6. Click "Fullscreen" for best experience

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
------------------
- Ctrl + Z: Undo
- Ctrl + Y: Redo
- Ctrl + S: Save image
- E: Toggle eraser
- [ / ]: Decrease/Increase brush size
- F1: Open Help

FEATURES
--------
- 7 preset brushes (Round, Square, Soft, Pencil, Marker, Spray, Charcoal)
- Custom brush creator
- Eraser, Smudge, Blur, Dodge, Burn tools
- 10 blend modes
- XPPen shortcut key support
- Pressure sensitivity
- In-app help system (F1)

TROUBLESHOOTING
---------------
- If pressure doesn't work: Check "Pressure" checkbox in toolbar
- If app won't move to pen display: Drag window manually
- For help: Press F1 in the app

SUPPORT
-------
GitHub: https://github.com/cms000123456/penpal
Issues: https://github.com/cms000123456/penpal/issues

LICENSE
-------
MIT License - Free to use and modify!

Enjoy drawing! 🎨
